content: Open-Meteo API supports CORS and requires no API key; browser fetch() can call api.open-meteo.com and archive-api.open-meteo.com directly with no proxy/backend needed. Typical response time ~270ms. IMPORTANT constraint: the free hosted API (api.open-meteo.com) is licensed for non-commercial use only per Open-Meteo's terms; commercial use requires self-hosting the open-source stack or a paid plan.
